editionData.title: June 18, 2026: Senate targets Hegseth’s travel in standoff over apparent Iran school attack, boat strikes; Russia’s war in Ukraine comes back into...
editionData.description: Global headlines: Senate targets Hegseth’s travel in standoff over apparent Iran school attack, boat strikes (Frustrated lawmakers are increasing pressure on the defense secretary to get answers they’ve sought for months); Russia’s war in Ukraine comes back into Trump’s focus with no end in sight (The president met with Ukraine’s Volodymyr Zelensky at the G-7 summit but told reporters the conflict “has no impact on us … we’re thousands of miles away.”); and Trump insists U.S. will not invest money in Iran as part of peace deal (Others in the president's circles, including Vice President JD Vance, have suggested Tehran could gain access to a major investment fund if it upholds its side of the peace accord). Markets leaned lower, with 4 of 7 tracked indexes down; HANG SENG INDEX down 1.78% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Midjourney Medical (midjourney.com: Midjourney Medical); Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability (Maintained by Epic Games, Lore is designed for unprecedented scalability of both data and teams. It’s optimized for projects that combine...); and Taxonomy of the Occlupanida (parasitoids on bread bag tags) (The Holotypic Occlupanid Research Group : A Database of Synthetic Taxonomy). Product Hunt features memi (The AI agent harness for product design teams), Dualora (Record in both 16:9 and 9:16 at the same time), and Android 17 (Android becomes an intelligence system).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Senate targets Hegseth’s travel in standoff over apparent Iran school attack, boat strikes
headlines.summary: Frustrated lawmakers are increasing pressure on the defense secretary to get answers they’ve sought for months.

headlines.title: Russia’s war in Ukraine comes back into Trump’s focus with no end in sight
headlines.summary: The president met with Ukraine’s Volodymyr Zelensky at the G-7 summit but told reporters the conflict “has no impact on us … we’re thousands of miles away.”

headlines.title: Trump insists U.S. will not invest money in Iran as part of peace deal
headlines.summary: Others in the president's circles, including Vice President JD Vance, have suggested Tehran could gain access to a major investment fund if it upholds its side of the peace accord.

headlines.title: China controls trade choke points beyond rare earths. It’s squeezing them.
headlines.summary: China is reaching beyond rare earth minerals to put restrictions on other key goods, so it can inflict pain in future trade wars while insulating itself from attacks.

headlines.title: Israelis denounce Trump’s deal with Iran
headlines.summary: Israeli officials disparaged the peace deal and said Israel’s fight against Hezbollah in Lebanon would go on.

headlines.title: Who benefits from Zimbabwe’s lithium boom?
headlines.summary: New projects and foreign-backed mines are reshaping Zimbabwe’s lithium sector, with uneven local gains.

headlines.title: US transfers immigrants out of Florida Alligator Alcatraz detention centre
headlines.summary: The facility, located near the Everglade wetlands, has drawn human rights concerns and lawsuits over its conditions.

headlines.title: Trump, Pezeshkian sign US-Iran MoU to end war, reopen Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Both sides say the deal is in effect and includes an end to war in Lebanon and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Diplomat confirms that US and Iran have signed MoU electronically
headlines.summary: Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei says the agreement has been finalised and signed with the US.

headlines.title: ‘Don’t meddle’: Lula calls on Trump to stay out of Brazil’s elections
headlines.summary: Lula is currently in a tight race for re-election against right-wing candidate Flavio Bolsonaro, an ally of Trump.

headlines.title: As western fires erupt, Trump's Forest Service says it's now fully staffed
headlines.summary: The Forest Service says it's fully staffed with seasonal firefighters going into summer but there are still questions about whether the government is prepared if major wildfires get out of hand.

headlines.title: Here's how much the Iran war cost -- and how its effects will linger
headlines.summary: More than three months after the U.S. and Israel launched their war on Iran, the costs and aftereffects are felt around the world.

headlines.title: An inside look at President Trump's campaign to acquire Greenland
headlines.summary: New Yorker writer Ben Taub says while the idea of acquiring Greenland is out of the headlines, it hasn't been dropped. Taub describes how Trump's ongoing efforts have broken the trust of our allies.

headlines.title: Tropical Storm Arthur is the first named storm of the Atlantic hurricane season
headlines.summary: Forecasters say Arthur could generate life-threatening flash floods along the northern Gulf Coast. But it is not expected to strengthen further.

headlines.title: Greetings from Maputo, Mozambique's capital, shaped by a modernist architecture
headlines.summary: An impromptu tour of Mozambique's capital city reveals a unique imprint left by architect Amâncio "Pancho" Guedes.

headlines.title: Nepal looks to strengthen collaboration with China
headlines.summary: Nepal's new government is looking to strengthen political engagement with China and expand cooperation in areas including connectivity, technology, governance and people-to-people exchanges, Foreign Minister Shisir Khanal says.

headlines.title: US Fed holds interest rate steady
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON - The US Federal Reserve on Wednesday kept the target range for the federal funds rate unchanged at 3.5-3.75 percent.

headlines.title: France ends contract with US tech giant
headlines.summary: As part of a European push to curb reliance on United States technology companies, France's domestic intelligence service has dropped US giant Palantir in favor of French rival ChapsVision, said France's Prime Minister Sebastien Lecornu on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Accord to end war on 'all fronts'
headlines.summary: Ahead of a widely publicized official signing of a memorandum of understanding between Iran and the United States, both sides indicated they would reveal more about the agreed-upon conditions, which include ending the war on "all fronts".

headlines.title: Japan slammed over slow probe into embassy attack
headlines.summary: China has criticized the lack of progress in Japan's investigation into and handling of a case involving a Self-Defense Forces officer who allegedly entered the Chinese embassy in Tokyo armed with a knife, urging Japan to take full responsibility for the incident.

headlines.title: ‘Parasites’: Supreme Court denies bail to man accused of cyberfraud, calls for sterner legislation
headlines.summary: The Supreme Court labels cyber fraudsters as “parasites” and emphasizes the need for strict action against them.

headlines.title: Delhi High Court issues notice to Centre on Telegram’s challenge to temporary ban ahead of NEET exam
headlines.summary: Delhi High Court issues notice to the Centre on Telegram's challenge against its temporary ban related to NEET exam concerns.

headlines.title: Telegram was warned about misuse before blanket ban, says NTA chief
headlines.summary: NTA warns Telegram of misuse before nationwide ban, citing concerns over exam fraud and inadequate feature adjustments.

headlines.title: Supreme Court defers hearing of plea challenging NEET-UG re-test to July
headlines.summary: Supreme Court postpones NEET-UG re-test plea hearing to July, impacting 22 lakh candidates amid ongoing investigation into paper leak.

headlines.title: Full body scanners on trial at four metro airports; BCAS also asks Srinagar, Jammu, Ayodhya to install them
headlines.summary: Full body scanners are being trialed at four metro airports to enhance security and reduce physical frisking for passengers.

headlines.title: Trump signs memo aimed at ending Iran war, White House official says
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump signs memo aimed at ending Iran war, White House official says.

headlines.title: Trump says US would do better without USMCA trade agreement
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump says US would do better without USMCA trade agreement.

headlines.title: Trump thanks China's Xi, Russia's Putin for being 'neutral' in Iran war
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump thanks China's Xi, Russia's Putin for being 'neutral' in Iran war.

headlines.title: Nvidia supplier SK Hynix ships samples of next-generation chips to major customers
headlines.summary: Reuters: Nvidia supplier SK Hynix ships samples of next-generation chips to major customers.

headlines.title: The 14-point U.S.-Iran pact as read by U.S. official
headlines.summary: Reuters: The 14-point U.S.-Iran pact as read by U.S. official.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
hackerNews.summary: Maintained by Epic Games, Lore is designed for unprecedented scalability of both data and teams. It’s optimized for projects that combine code with large binary assets.

hackerNews.title: Taxonomy of the Occlupanida (parasitoids on bread bag tags)
hackerNews.summary: The Holotypic Occlupanid Research Group : A Database of Synthetic Taxonomy

hackerNews.title: US holds off blacklisting DeepSeek, more than 100 firms deemed security risks
hackerNews.summary: reuters.com: US holds off blacklisting DeepSeek, more than 100 firms deemed security risks.

hackerNews.title: Storied Colors – a catalogue of named colors
hackerNews.summary: Storied Colors: named colors with documented histories.

hackerNews.title: Clojure Hosted on Go
hackerNews.summary: Clojure interpreter hosted on Go, with extensible interop support. - glojurelang/glojure

hackerNews.title: Loreline – Tools for writing interactive fiction
hackerNews.summary: Tools for writing interactive fiction, video game dialogues and branching narratives

hackerNews.title: Launch HN: Adam (YC W25) – Open-Source AI CAD
hackerNews.summary: CADAM is the open source text-to-CAD web application - Adam-CAD/CADAM

hackerNews.title: [x86] AI Compute Extensions (ACE) Specification
hackerNews.summary: This document defines x86 extensions for accelerating computation tasks, initially focusing on matrix multiplication kernels and reduced precision data formats important to ML workloads.
